summary: Iteration 108: Tested Training Matrix feature. Backend API (GET /api/employees/{id}/training/matrix) returns correct structure with items array, summary stats, and blocker indicators. Frontend TrainingMatrix.js component displays correctly with summary stats (Total Required, Current, Needs Renewal, Missing), progress bar, training table with status badges, evidence status, and action buttons. Work Readiness Engine correctly integrates training status - training blockers only appear when training is incomplete.

minor.issue: Summary 'current' count shows 0 even when items have status 'verified'. The counting logic only counts 'current' and 'completed' statuses, not 'verified'. This is a display inconsistency.

action_items: Consider updating summary count logic to include 'verified' status in 'current' count for consistency
seed_data_creation: None - used existing employee with training records
context_for_next_testing_agent: Training Matrix feature fully implemented. Key data-testids: training-matrix, training-matrix-loading, training-matrix-empty, training-matrix-search, training-matrix-filter, blockers-only-checkbox, refresh-training-matrix-btn, training-row-{code}, upload-cert-{code}, view-cert-{code}. TrainingMatrix.js at /app/frontend/src/components/training/TrainingMatrix.js. Backend endpoint at /app/backend/server.py line 7270. Work Readiness Engine at /app/backend/work_readiness_engine.py correctly uses training status.

training_matrix_endpoint.details: GET /api/employees/{id}/training/matrix returns 200 with correct structure: employee_id, employee_name, role, items array, summary object

training_matrix_items_structure.details: Each item has: code, title, status, blocker, evidence_required, completed_at, expires_at, has_evidence, verified, record_id

training_matrix_summary_stats.details: Summary includes: total (6), current (0), expiring (0), missing (0), blockers (2)

training_matrix_progress_bar.details: Progress bar shows completion percentage with color coding

training_matrix_table.details: Table shows Training, Status, Completed, Expires, Evidence, Actions columns with 6 rows

training_matrix_status_badges.details: Status badges show Current, Missing, Expired, Verified states with appropriate colors

training_matrix_blocker_indicators.details: Blocker badge shown for mandatory training items (Safeguarding, Manual Handling)

training_matrix_evidence_status.details: Evidence column shows Verified, Uploaded, or None badges

training_matrix_filters.details: Search input, status filter dropdown (All Status, Action Needed, Current, Expiring Soon, Missing, Expired), and Blockers only checkbox all functional

training_matrix_action_buttons.details: Upload certificate and View certificate buttons present for each training item

training_intake_wizard_integration.details: Upload & Scan button present in Training Records section for TrainingIntakeWizard

work_readiness_training_integration.details: Work Readiness Engine correctly evaluates training status - no training blockers when all training is verified

proposed_training_items_endpoint.details: GET /api/employees/{id}/training/proposed-items returns 200 with items array for pending review

console_errors_noted: 404 on employment-mismatch endpoint (pre-existing issue, unrelated to training matrix)
